data.body:
Virginity is a myth, but AFABs do have a hymen; it’s left over from fetal development and may reduce infections from fecal matter. 
Becomes crescent shaped, so doesn’t fully block a vaginal opening. If you have an imperforate hymen (1 in 10 000 births) it would be surgically perforated or removed.
